testcase.name: test_admin_login_missing_email

failure.message: AssertionError: Devrait rejeter sans email: 200 assert 200 in [422, 400] + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: test_01_laravel_auth.py:56: in test_admin_login_missing_email assert r.status_code in [422, 400], f"Devrait rejeter sans email: {r.status_code}" E AssertionError: Devrait rejeter sans email: 200 E assert 200 in [422, 400] E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
